title: health check endpoint returns status and version
description: Test GET / endpoint to verify it returns HTTP 200 with JSON containing status and version fields indicating the backend is running.

title: predict endpoint accepts valid image and returns prediction
description: Test POST /predict with valid JPEG, PNG, or WEBP image files under 10MB to ensure it returns HTTP 200 with JSON containing id, predicted_class, and confidence_score, and that the prediction is stored in the database.

title: predict endpoint rejects unsupported media types
description: Test POST /predict with unsupported file types (e.g., text/plain) to verify it returns HTTP 415 Unsupported Media Type error.

title: predict endpoint rejects files exceeding size limit
description: Test POST /predict with image files larger than 10MB to verify it returns HTTP 413 Payload Too Large error.

title: predict endpoint rejects corrupt or unreadable images
description: Test POST /predict with corrupt or unreadable image files to verify it returns HTTP 400 Invalid image file error.

title: predict endpoint requires file field
description: Test POST /predict without the file field to verify it returns HTTP 422 Validation Error indicating missing file field.

title: history endpoint returns all prediction records
description: Test GET /history to verify it returns HTTP 200 with an array of prediction records including id, image_path, predicted_class, confidence_score, and timestamp.

title: history endpoint returns empty array when no records
description: Test GET /history when no predictions exist to verify it returns HTTP 200 with an empty array.

title: delete prediction endpoint removes record by id
description: Test DELETE /history/{prediction_id} with a valid existing prediction id to verify it returns HTTP 200 with success message and that subsequent GET /history does not include the deleted record.

title: delete prediction endpoint handles non existent id
description: Test DELETE /history/{prediction_id} with a non-existent prediction id to verify it returns HTTP 404 with detail message indicating data not found.
